title: Screen
description: Per-screen spec (screens-first, R1/R32). Every descendant node captured verbatim from client.getFileNodes + transformNode — typography, colors, dimensions, nested icons. Mock data 1:1 Figma (R3).

viewportFit.description: How the screen root occupies the viewport. See R31.

tree.description: Ordered layout tree. Every descendant captured per R1/R32.

mockData.description: Exact text/data captured from Figma (R3). No inventing.

dataDrivenStyles.description: Map of field value → variant name for data-bound components.

role.description: A2 carries A1's index.yml role forward. Overlays are rendered on top of their base screen rather than routed standalone.

overlayOf.description: Parent screen slug. Required when role=overlay.

modals.description: Overlay components layered on this base screen. A2 extracts delta subtrees from overlay-role siblings in the same index.yml page and records them here. Each entry references a modal component spec in components/<name>.yml (classification.kind='library-wrapped'|'custom', variant corresponds to an overlay variant e.g. 'default', 'success', 'fail'). Empty when the screen has no overlays.

sourceOverlaySlug.description: Slug of the overlay screen in index.yml this modal was extracted from.

componentName.description: Name of the component spec in components/<name>.yml.

variantName.description: Variant within the modal component (e.g. nested overlay states Urgenza ON/OFF become variants).

openTrigger.description: Best-effort label for trigger source on base screen (button text, icon). Optional — may be inferred later.

closeTrigger.description: Best-effort label for close affordance. Optional.

state.description: Free-form state params passed to modal (e.g. selected row id).

kind.description: Legacy kinds 'component' / 'container' still accepted for backward-compat with pre-screens-first contracts.

mainComponentKey.description: Instance only — stable library component key, used to cluster across screens

colorToken.description: Fill token path (R6). Must resolve to a key in tokens.map.

text.description: Only for kind=text. Content + typography style key + resolved color token + align.

icon.description: Only for kind=vector or instance-wrapping-vector. Links back to icons.yml.

imageFrame.description: Only for image fills (R29). Preserve crop percentages verbatim.

rendered.description: Free-form decoration observed from in-screen transformNode output. Used when an instance has decoration beyond its master defaults.
